flags.concern: Track row dragging: Step 2 assumes the existing canvas rows can simply be wrapped in `useSortable`, but the real row stack is absolutely positioned rather than a normal list, so `verticalListSortingStrategy` will not behave like the current sidebar sortable list without a larger row-layout refactor or custom strategy.
flags.evidence: `TimelineCanvas` renders each row as `className="absolute left-0 right-0"` with `style={{ top, height: rowHeight }}` in `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineCanvas.tsx:381-390`. The current sortable track list works in normal flow inside the sidebar column in `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.tsx:263-292`.

flags.concern: Track row dragging: The execution order says inline labels can coexist with the old sidebar for validation, but `TrackLabel` already calls `useSortable({ id })`; rendering both versions at once would duplicate sortable registrations for the same track ids, and the plan never calls out extracting a non-sortable label component.
flags.evidence: `TrackLabel` owns its own sortable state in `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TrackLabel.tsx:56-69`, and the existing sidebar already renders one `TrackLabel` per `track-${track.id}` in `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.tsx:279-289`. Step 2 also proposes wrapping the whole row in `useSortable`, which would add another sortable layer unless `TrackLabel` is refactored first.

flags.concern: Timeline drop coordinates: Step 6 points the executor at `resolveDropTarget`, but that helper is not on the active drag/drop path; the repository computes both clip-drag and external-drop placement through `computeDropPosition`, so widening the inline label gutter without updating that path risks wrong drop times or row placement.
flags.evidence: `resolveDropTarget` is only defined in `src/tools/video-editor/lib/coordinate-utils.ts:119-133` and has no callers. The active path is `useDragCoordinator` calling `computeDropPosition` in `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useDragCoordinator.ts:131-143`, which uses `startLeft` directly in `src/tools/video-editor/lib/drop-position.ts:73-99`; external asset/file drops reuse that coordinator in `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts:98-133`.

flags.concern: Timeline footer controls: Scope creep: moving `+Video`/`+Audio` into a footer row inside the canvas adds unrelated work in the same space that already serves as the below-last-row 'create new track' drop zone, even though the idea is only to inline labels with their rows.
flags.evidence: The current below-last-row area is already special-cased as a create-track target in `src/tools/video-editor/lib/drop-position.ts:97-105`, and `DropIndicator` decorates that region via the edit-area overlay in `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/DropIndicator.tsx:65-80`. Putting persistent controls into that zone would require extra event/layout handling the plan does not mention.
